script: echo === errors.log tail ===; sudo tail -30 /home/alejandro/.alejandro-bot/responder-errors.log 2>&1; echo; echo === debug.log tail ===; sudo tail -50 /home/alejandro/.alejandro-bot/responder-debug.log 2>&1; echo; echo === claude-bot-token.env perms ===; sudo ls -la /run/claude-bot-token.env 2>&1; echo; echo === token-refresh service ===; systemctl is-active claude-bot-token-refresh.service 2>&1
